meta.title: Promotion State Machine
meta.description: Governs how shards move through truth and promotion ladders.

PROPOSED_to_REVIEWED.trigger: certification by a node with cert_capability

REVIEWED_to_PROMOTED.trigger: governance decision or automatic if all checks pass

requires: replacement shard exists with DERIVES edge

truth_promotion_coupling.rule: promotion_status cannot exceed truth_status by more than one rung
truth_promotion_coupling.example: a SEED shard can be at most PROPOSED, never PROMOTED
